name: Discovery & Verification
description: Fetches structured capability metadata from /.well-known/agent-discovery.json (Agent Discovery Protocol, ADP) before tool calls to external domains and surfaces capability signals into the tool call log. Schema-agnostic by design: future commits will add A2A Agent Card and agent.json resolvers behind the same hook.

enabled.description: Master switch for the plugin. Default: true.

cacheTtlSeconds.description: How long to cache discovery results (success and authoritative misses) per domain. Default: 3600.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Per-attempt HTTP timeout for the discovery fetch. Default: 5000.

maxBodyBytes.description: Cap on the response body size to prevent memory exhaustion. Default: 1048576 (1 MiB).

logCapabilitySignals.description: When true, emits a structured log entry every time a discovery resolves. Default: true.
